summary: FIDUS Franchise Portal Phase 3 - Complete testing of Client Portal, Agent Portal, and P1 catch-all route fix. All 12 backend tests pass. All UI flows work correctly including login, dashboard display, and logout for both portals.
seed_data_creation: Using existing Test Franchise Co with 1 client (Maria Garcia, $150,000 in incubation) and 1 agent (Carlos Lopez, Tier 40%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Franchise Portal Phase 3 is fully functional. Client Portal shows Maria Garcia's $150,000 investment in incubation status with contract timeline. Agent Portal shows Carlos Lopez with 40% commission tier and 0 referred clients (empty state expected). P1 catch-all route fix verified - navigating to random URLs shows login page instead of blank screen.

client_portal.POST /api/franchise/auth/client/login: PASS - Returns token, client data, company data
client_portal.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/client/over: PASS - Returns filtered client investment data

agent_portal.POST /api/franchise/auth/agent/login: PASS - Returns token, agent data, company data
agent_portal.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/agent/overv: PASS - Returns filtered agent referral data

existing_admin_portal.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/overview: PASS - Now shows 1 client, 1 agent, $150,000 AUM
